# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change clearly.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Deployment/config
- [ ] UI update
- [ ] IoT/firmware update

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds locally
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] API URLs are correct for environment
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Screenshots added if UI changed
- [ ] Tested relevant flow

## Screenshots / Evidence

Add screenshots, logs, or test results here.
